title: prunus domestica subsp. cerea
intro: Prunus domestica subsp. cerea, also known as the wild plum or mountain plum, is a subspecies of the European plum tree native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Prunus domestica subsp. cerea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Prunus domestica subsp. cerea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in jams and preserves.
